'''√w-y-m''' ('''kawayam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laparotomize|laparotomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laparotomize|laparotomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-y-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawayam
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiwayam || jiwayam || shiwayam || kiwayam
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuwayam || jujuwayam || shushuwayam || kukuwayam
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuwayam || juwayam || shuwayam || kuwayam
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuwayam || juwayam || shuwayam || kuwayam
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thewayam || jewayam || shewayam || kewayam
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothowayam || jojowayam || shoshowayam || kokowayam
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thowayam || jowayam || showayam || kowayam
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thowayam || jowayam || showayam || kowayam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wayam || wayam || wayam || wayam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wayam || wayam || wayam || wayam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wayam || wayam || wayam || wayam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wayam || wayam || wayam || wayam
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæwayam || jæwayam || shæwayam || kæwayam
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathawayam || jajawayam || shashawayam || kakawayam
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thawayam || jawayam || shawayam || kawayam
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thawayam || jawayam || shawayam || kawayam
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shawayam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshawayam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishawayam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shawayamnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshawayamnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishawayamnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shawayamshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshawayamnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishawayamshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shawayamro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshawayamnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishawayamro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shawayammu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshawayamnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishawayammu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shawayamsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshawayamnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishawayamsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shawayamng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshawayamnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishawayamng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shawayamya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshawayamnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishawayamya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shawayamyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshawayamnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishawayamyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shawayamnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshawayamnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishawayamnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shawayamnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawayamnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawayamnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shawayamnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshawayamnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawayamnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shawayamshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshawayamnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishawayamshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shawayamshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawayamnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawayamshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shawayamshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshawayamnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawayamshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shawayamronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshawayamnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishawayamronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shawayamroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshawayamnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishawayamroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shawayamromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshawayamnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawayamromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shawayammunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshawayamnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishawayammunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shawayammushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshawayamnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishawayammushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shawayammuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawayamnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawayammuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
